accepted_rule: Use ihs2_household.idate as the household interview date, converted from Stata days since 1960-01-01.
remaining_blocker: Climate exposure windows are not extracted yet; this only accepts the raw timing anchor.

accepted_rule: Anchor climate exposure windows to interview month; candidate windows are 1, 3, 6, and 12 complete months before interview month.
raw_label_evidence: Official/public metadata records 2004-03 through 2005-03 fieldwork; raw idate confirms month coverage.
remaining_blocker: Exact climate values still require CHIRPS/ERA5 extraction after geography route acceptance.

accepted_rule: Use dist+ta+ea as the household EA/admin geography key; use V51 as the 8-digit EA/PSU identifier.

numeric_evidence: households=11280; distinct dist+ta+ea=564; distinct V51=564; household_ea_unmatched_to_ea_file=0.
remaining_blocker: No household or cluster coordinates are accepted; boundary/crosswalk source remains required for climate extraction.

accepted_rule: Join household dist+ta+ea to ihs2_ea_data for auxiliary EA attributes only; do not treat access fields as coordinates.
raw_label_evidence: access=Travel time to nearest trading center/boma; access2=Travel time to nearest trading center/boma; lz_code=LZ_CODE.
remaining_blocker: EA auxiliary data improve geography context but do not solve historical boundary geometry.

accepted_rule: For person-level health/access work, inherit household geography through case_id after confirming health households join to ihs2_household.

accepted_rule: Do not mark a CHIRPS or ERA5 route accepted yet; use admin/EA geography only after a boundary/crosswalk and aggregation method are documented.
